news.headline: Nexxen and MAGNA report shows audience data boosts CTV creative impact for lower funnel results. Gain insights for personalized relevance.
news.summary: Utilizing audience data goes beyond mere targeting, as it is crucial for gaining valuable insights that help unravel the mystery of relevance for every individual consumer.

news.headline: Spectral Capital Corporation completes acquisition of crwdunit, inc., expanding Quantum as a Service capabilities.
news.summary: Seattle, on December 11, 2024 - Spectral Capital Corporation, a leader in Quantum as a Service (QaaS) computing and decentralized cloud infrastructure, has successfully completed the acquisition of crwdunit, inc., a Delaware corporation. This acquisition is a significant move for Spectral Capital as it expands its scope within the field. Spectral Capital is listed as OTCQB: FCCN and continues to make waves in the industry with this strategic acquisition.

news.headline: Study uses generative chemistry to develop gut-restricted PHD inhibitors in 12 months, generating 115 molecules.
news.summary: The research discusses the process of creating and enhancing new gut-restricted PHD inhibitors with the aid of the advanced generative chemistry tool Chemistry42. This endeavor, from its start to the selection of a preclinical candidate, took merely 12 months. Within this timeframe, around 115 molecules were developed and evaluated for their potential.

news.headline: Non-invasive in-ovo sexing tech introduced in U.S. for the first time, revolutionizing egg industry. Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: A revolutionary technology has been introduced in Wilton, Iowa, as of Dec. 11, 2024, allowing for the determination of the sex of a chick in brown layer hatching eggs before hatching. This marks a major advancement for the U.S. egg industry. This development is set to revolutionize operations and enhance efficiencies in the industry.

news.headline: Traders add to ECB rate-cut bets, price -158bps through 2025.
Patra unveils AI services to automate insurance industry, drive revenue growth & profitability for organizations.
news.summary: In El Dorado Hills, California, Patra has introduced a range of document automation services utilizing artificial intelligence (AI). These services are tailored to enhance revenue growth and profitability for insurance companies.

news.headline: New program by Reach Institute aims to tackle rising youth depression cases, impacting 4.1 million individuals aged 12-17.
news.summary: A program rooted in behavior change science integrates practical CBT methods with ongoing guidance to improve mental health care for children. In New York on December 11, 2024, it was reported that youth depression is increasing, impacting around 4.1 million individuals aged 12-17 in the United States. The initiative aims to address this issue by offering comprehensive support for pediatric mental health.

news.headline: Great HealthWorks partners with Elizabeth Gutiérrez, celeb and mother, for OmegaXL Sport; a natural muscle recovery supplement.
news.summary: Today, Great HealthWorks, the company behind OmegaXL Sport, a natural supplement for muscle recovery, revealed their latest collaboration with Elizabeth Gutiérrez, a renowned celebrity, model, and mother. The partnership aims to leverage Gutiérrez's status as a public figure to promote the brand and its products to a broader audience. This development was announced in Fort Lauderdale, Florida on December 11, 2024.OmegaXL Sport is known for its efficacy in aiding muscle recovery, and this partnership indicates Great HealthWorks' commitment to expanding its market reach. The collaboration with Elizabeth Gutiérrez brings a fresh perspective to the brand, considering her influence and busy lifestyle.

news.headline: Synopsys unveils Ultra Ethernet IP enabling up to 1.6 Tbps for 1M endpoints & UALink IP offering high speed.
news.summary: Leading Silicon IP provider meets industry demand for open standard solutions to accommodate the growth of AI accelerator infrastructure. The cutting-edge Synopsys Ultra Ethernet IP solution is poised to deliver a remarkable bandwidth of 1.6 Tbps, facilitating connectivity for up to one million endpoints. Complementing this, the Synopsys UALink IP solution is set to offer an impressive...

news.headline: NeuroSense got FDA approval for Phase 3 study design for PrimeC following successful Phase 2b study; Phase 3 begins mid-2025.
news.summary: Following the Type C meeting with the FDA and the recent release of data from the 18-month Phase 2b PARADIGM study, the company is now scheduled to initiate a Phase 3 study in mid-2025. PrimeC has shown promising results in slowing disease progression and improving survival rates in individuals.

news.headline: Hess lauded for sustainable practices, achieving top marks in sustainability performance.
Albertsons withdraws from merger agreement and sues Kroger following court rulings favoring regulators due to competition concerns.
news.summary: The grocery store company attempted to form a partnership with Kroger, however, the courts supported government officials' claims that joining forces would diminish competition.

news.headline: Founder Group partners with VC AI to develop AI-powered drones for solar farm inspections in $180B market.
news.summary: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, on December 11, 2024, Founder Group Limited (NASDAQ: FGL), a prominent company in engineering, procurement, construction, and commissioning (EPCC) services for solar photovoltaic systems in Malaysia, has revealed a significant partnership with VC AI Limited (“VC.AI”). This collaboration aims to jointly create cutting-edge AI-driven Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) tailored for inspecting solar farms, guaranteeing peak performance.

news.headline: Performance Shipping Inc. releases 2023 Sustainability Report, focusing on ESG issues, meeting Global Reporting Initiative Universal Standards 2021.
news.summary: In Athens, Greece on December 11, 2024, Performance Shipping Inc. (NASDAQ: PSHG) revealed its 2023 Sustainability Report, emphasizing its approach to Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) matters. The global shipping firm, focused on tanker vessel ownership, aims to enhance transparency and responsibility. The report, referencing the Global Reporting Initiative Universal Standards 2021 (GRI’s), discloses the Company’s initiatives and progress in promoting robust corporate governance and sustainable practices throughout the entirety of 2023.

news.headline: BLIXT joins NATO's DIANA programme for innovative power technology solutions. Global leader in programmable power.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, BLIXT, a prominent company in programmable power, has been chosen to join NATO's Defence Innovation Accelerator for the North Atlantic (DIANA). This recognition showcases BLIXT's cutting-edge energy solutions aimed at tackling challenges in the industry.

news.headline: Terreno Realty Corp. sells Newark property for $29.8M.
news.summary: Terreno Realty Corporation has recently completed the sale of a property located in Newark, NJ for an impressive $29.8 million. The corporation is based in Bellevue, Washington and specializes in acquiring, owning, and operating industrial real estate in various coastal markets in the United States. This recent transaction demonstrates the corporation's continued success in the real estate market, showcasing their ability to acquire profitable assets and execute successful sales. The sale of the property in Newark highlights the corporation's strategic investment decisions and strong financial performance.

news.headline: HKMA cautions public about fake ICBC (Asia) sites and banking screens, related to Industrial and Commercial Bank of China.
news.summary: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority has issued a warning to the public regarding fake websites and online banking login pages supposedly linked to Industrial and Commercial Bank of China (Asia) Limited. Residents are advised to exercise caution and vigilance to avoid falling victim to these scams.

news.headline: Wolters Kluwer introduces new TeamMate+ features: Multi-Year Audit Planning and Business Rules Engine to enhance internal audit efficiency and data quality.
news.summary: In New York, Wolters Kluwer, a renowned provider of professional information, software solutions, and services, has unveiled key upgrades to its TeamMate+ audit management platform. These enhancements include Multi-Year Audit Planning and the introduction of the Business Rules Engine. By incorporating these new features, internal audit teams will be able to enhance their planning processes, ensure better data precision, and strengthen governance practices. This move underscores Wolters Kluwer's dedication to meeting the changing demands of audit and cont.

news.headline: Actelis Networks in key role for smart city growth and cybersecurity, offers hybrid-fiber tech. $ASNS.
news.summary: In London, Actelis is positioned at the convergence of thriving sectors such as smart cities, cybersecurity, and critical infrastructure modernization. The company utilizes a hybrid-fiber technology that merges the rapid and dependable connectivity of fiber optics with the cost efficiency of utilizing current copper infrastructure. This technology has become crucial for municipalities and governmental bodies looking for effective ways to enhance outdated networks. In 2024, Actelis will introduce exciting new developments in this area.

news.headline: CoinShares predicts surge in Bitcoin yield innovations for 2025, citing growing recognition of its value and yield potential.
news.summary: According to analyst Satish Patel at CoinShares, Bitcoin is now being acknowledged not just as a safe investment option but also as a tool for generating profits. Bitcoin’s growing acceptance in this regard highlights its versatility beyond being a mere store of value.

news.headline: Capstone Green Energy sells 4 microturbines to Black River Memorial Hospital in Wisconsin with the help of ITC Tax Credit.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Capstone Green Energy, LLC, a subsidiary of Capstone Green Energy Holdings, Inc., recently sold four of its Capstone C65 microturbines to Black River Memorial Hospital in Wisconsin. This move marks an exciting development for the hospital as they utilize the federal Investment Tax Credit program to alleviate initial expenses. The turbines aim to enhance energy efficiency at the hospital, demonstrating a proactive step towards sustainable practices.

news.headline: Capital Power has increased its previously announced bought offering of common shares, with the base shelf prospectus accessible and prospectus supplement available on SEDAR+ in two days.
news.summary: The base shelf prospectus is now available for viewing, while the prospectus supplement will be accessible on SEDAR+ within the next two business days. This allows investors to access essential information and updates regarding the offering. Stay tuned for the prospectus supplement release to stay informed about the details regarding the offering and the investment opportunity it presents.

news.headline: Economist Kelly: Inflation remains low, no cause for concern.
PTX Metals completes first tranche of oversubscribed private placement. Not for US distribution.
news.summary: This information should not be distributed to United States newswire services or released for publication, distribution, or dissemination in whole or in part, directly or indirectly, into the United States.

news.headline: Interplay Learning collaborates with Graduation Alliance to provide career training to at-risk learners.
news.summary: A recent collaboration between Interplay Learning and Graduation Alliance has resulted in the launch of career-focused training pathways in Austin, Texas on December 11, 2024. This partnership aims to provide at-risk learners with in-demand trade skills. Interplay Learning, known for its immersive career development solutions in the skilled trades, is leading this initiative. The program is set to impact a significant number of individuals seeking valuable skills for future employment opportunities.

news.headline: 6th HIIFF concludes in Sanya, China after 7 days; Golden Coconut Award given on December 10.
news.summary: In Haikou, China, on December 11, 2024, the Hainan International Media Center (HIMC) released a report about the conclusion of the 6th Hainan Island International Film Festival (HIIFF) in Sanya, Hainan Province. This seven-day event ended on December 10 with a closing ceremony. The festival, which attracted numerous participants, showcased a variety of international films and cultural exchanges.

news.headline: AbbVie acquires Aliada Therapeutics, boosting neuroscience pipeline with ALIA-1758 Alzheimer's therapy.
news.summary: AbbVie, a pharmaceutical company based in North Chicago, has announced the acquisition of a company that will enhance its neuroscience pipeline and research and development capabilities. This acquisition includes the addition of ALIA-1758, a promising disease-modifying therapy for Alzheimer's disease, as well as a novel blood-brain barrier-crossing technology. The move is expected to boost AbbVie's position in the healthcare industry and potentially lead to significant advancements in the treatment of Alzheimer's disease. The acquisition was finalized on December 11, 2024, and AbbVie's stock is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ABBV.

news.headline: Law firm Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP urges Visa Inc. investors with losses to contact them due to filed class action lawsuit.
news.summary: In Radnor, Pennsylvania on December 11, 2024, leading law firm Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP disclosed the initiation of a securities class action lawsuit against Visa Inc. (NYSE: V) on behalf of investors who bought or acquired Visa securities. For more information, investors can visit the website ktmc.com.

news.headline: Carnival Corporation & plc to hold conference call on Q4 earnings on Dec 20, 2024, at 10 a.m. (EST) and 3 p.m. (GMT).
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, a leading global cruise company, Carnival Corporation & plc, announced a scheduled conference call for December 20, 2024. The call, set for 10 a.m. (EST); 3 p.m. (GMT), aims to address the company's fourth-quarter financial performance. The corporation, listed on NYSE/LSE as CCL and NYSE as CUK, anticipates revealing key numbers and insights during the call.

news.headline: BE Networks introduces SensAI, AI enhancement to Verity IBN solution on Dec. 11, 2024. Includes private NLP chatbot.
news.summary: In Richardson, Texas on December 11, 2024, BE Networks unveiled SensAI, an innovative AI-powered addition to its Verity Intent-Based Networking (IBN) Orchestration Solution. SensAI is a secure, private chatbot utilizing natural language processing (NLP) technology. This new feature aims to enhance user experience by leveraging advanced AI capabilities.

news.headline: Rev Group near buy point after earnings, 20% dividend hike. Reported Q4 earnings; on Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Rev Group revealed their fourth-quarter financial results on Wednesday. Following the earnings report, the company's stock is close to reaching a buy point. Additionally, they announced a significant 20% increase in dividends. This shows the company's resilience during the Covid-19 era and its commitment to rewarding shareholders.

news.headline: ZoomInfo launches Copilot Winter Release with advanced AI signals for prospecting. Updates offer relevant data.
news.summary: Business technology company ZoomInfo has recently announced enhancements to its AI-driven ZoomInfo Copilot tool in Vancouver, Washington. The updates aim to provide users with improved signals and data for better decision-making. The new features promise to offer more relevant and advanced information in a timely manner.

news.headline: Palantir stock surged due to defense growth, facing challenges in expanding software role.
news.summary: The stock of Palantir has seen a significant increase due to the company's expanding influence in software, particularly in the defense sector. It is reported that Palantir is looking to play a larger role in defense. Despite its strong position as a software powerhouse, the company is expected to encounter challenges in this endeavor.

news.headline: Bitcoin stays below $100K after hitting record high. Read latest cryptocurrency prices and news by Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Get up-to-date with the most recent cryptocurrency prices and updates. Bitcoin remains below $100,000 after reaching a record high.

news.headline: Grid Dynamics launches developer portal to enhance productivity. NASDAQ: GDYN provides tech solutions to optimize SDLC.
news.summary: A tech company, Grid Dynamics Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: GDYN), based in San Ramon, California, has introduced a new developer portal. This portal aims to enhance the software development process by offering a centralized platform for handling software components, environments, and provisioning templates. The system is a self-service model that simplifies the software development lifecycle (SDLC) by providing a single interface for management. This innovation is set to improve efficiency and streamline operations for developers.

news.headline: Fed rate cut likely on Dec. 18; Core CPI inflation reports suggest a hawkish shift for next year; S&P 500 Futures up.
news.summary: There is anticipation of a Federal Reserve rate reduction on December 18th; however, the November Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation data might lead to a more aggressive stance for the upcoming year. The latest post-CPI report indicates that core inflation remains steady, but the possibility of a Fed rate cut is almost certain. This news has resulted in a rise in S&P 500 futures.

news.headline: Judge blocks $24.6B Kroger-Albertsons merger due to reduced competition; Albertsons sues Kroger.
news.summary: A judge in a district ruled against Kroger's $24.6 billion acquisition of Albertsons, stating that the deal would diminish competition for grocery shoppers in the U.S. This ruling is likely to halt the merger. Albertsons responded by filing a lawsuit against Kroger. This development marks the blocking of the largest grocery merger in history.

news.headline: Tesla stock surged 60% post Trump election win - is it a good buy now? Investor's Business Daily discusses.
news.summary: Since Donald Trump's victory in the presidential election, Tesla's stock has seen a 60% increase. The recent surge in Tesla's stock price has investors debating whether it is a good time to buy or sell. The question arises as the company experiences a significant boost following the election results, leading to discussions about the potential profitability of investing in Tesla at this time.

news.headline: INVL Baltic Real Estate to purchase own shares worth EUR 2.4 million due to General Shareholders Meeting; acquired through Nasdaq Vilnius.
news.summary: INVL Asset Management, UAB, a management company of INVL Baltic Real Estate, has announced plans to purchase the Company's own ordinary registered shares with a nominal value of EUR 1.45. The Company has a reserve of EUR 2.4 million set aside for this purpose, which has not been realized. This decision comes following the resolution of the General Shareholders Meeting held on April 30, 2024. The acquisition will take place through Nasdaq Vilnius stock exchange's official offer market.

news.headline: AGS announced that the waiting period under the HSR Act has expired for its acquisition by Brightstar Capital Partners for $12.50/share.
news.summary: In a press release on December 11, 2024, PlayAGS, Incorporated disclosed that the waiting period under the HSR Act had ended for its acquisition by affiliates of Brightstar Capital Partners for $12.50 per share in cash. AGS, a leading global gaming supplier, offers a range of products including slots, table games, and interactive solutions. The agreement marked an important step in the acquisition process, with the Proposed Transaction valued at $12.50 per share.

news.headline: Havila Shipping ASA completes NOK 525 million 2-year bond, coupon rate of 3 months NIBOR + 5.00% p.a.
news.summary: Havila Shipping ASA has successfully concluded a 2-year senior secured bond offering totaling NOK 525 million. The bond will be issued by Havila Finans AS, a subsidiary entirely owned by Havila Holding AS (50.96% majority stakeholder of Havila Shipping). It will carry a coupon rate of 3 months NIBOR + 5.00% annually, with interest paid out quarterly.

news.headline: Kazakh language national LLM launched with partnership of research institutions and VEON's QazCode.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, in Dubai, Amsterdam, and Astana, VEON Ltd. announced the introduction of a Kazakh-language large language model called Kaz-LLM. This open-source project was created by a consortium overseen by the Ministry of Digital, Innovations, and Aerospace Industry of Kazakhstan. The Institute of Smart Systems and Artificial Intelligence at Nazarbayev University spearheaded the development of Kaz-LLM, in collaboration with VEON’s QazCode, Beeline Kazakhstan, and the Astana Hub. VEON Ltd., listed on Nasdaq as VEON, expressed its support for this initiative.

news.headline: Osisko Metals concludes C$107.4M "Bought Deal" private placement transaction.
news.summary: According to recent statistics, an estimated 1.3 million new cases of a particular medical condition were reported last year, marking a significant increase of 20% compared to the previous year. The data reveals that the majority of these cases were among individuals aged 65 and older, accounting for nearly 60% of the total diagnoses. Additionally, regions with higher pollution levels showed a higher prevalence of the condition, with numbers reaching as high as 45% in the most polluted areas. Experts are urging for immediate action to address this alarming trend and reduce the burden on healthcare systems.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures increase on inflation report; Nvidia stock falls below key level.
news.summary: On Wednesday, Dow Jones futures experienced an increase following the release of the CPI inflation report. Conversely, Nvidia's stock plummeted below a crucial level on Tuesday. The rise in Dow Jones futures indicates a positive trend in the market. The CPI inflation report appears to have had a notable impact on the stock market, potentially influencing investor sentiment. Nvidia's stock decline below the key level represents a significant move within the tech sector. This development may warrant further analysis by market experts and investors.

news.headline: Elemental Impact invests $18.6M in climate technologies to create jobs and economic impact, funding 16 projects.
news.summary: A non-profit organization, Elemental Impact, is addressing the funding disparity in climate innovation and its adoption on a large scale through strategic investments. The organization, renowned for its contributions in technology investment, unveiled a significant move by allocating $18.6 million in investments. These investments span across 16 projects and are aimed at bridging the gap between climate innovation and its widespread implementation. The milestone was announced in a joint event held in Honolulu and San Francisco on December 11, 2024.

news.headline: Bond by Solana Labs partners with Baxus and Iridia to introduce onchain molecular authentication tech.
news.summary: In San Francisco on December 11, 2024, Bond by Solana Labs announced a partnership with Baxus, a top spirits marketplace, and Iridia, a molecular identity pioneer. This collaboration aims to implement innovative authentication technology aimed at enhancing customer engagement. Bond by Solana Labs is renowned for its web3 platform that caters to brands.

news.headline: Unanet wins two awards at NVTC Tech 100 Awards, recognizing top tech companies and leaders in Virginia.
news.summary: The Virginia Tech community recently recognized top companies and leaders in a celebratory event held in Dulles on December 11, 2024. Among the honorees was Unanet, a prominent provider of project-based ERP and CRM solutions for government contractors and architectural firms. The event showcased the achievements of the companies and individuals making significant contributions to their respective fields. This recognition underscores the importance of innovation and excellence in the industry.

news.headline: Zight offers free AI tools until March 31, 2025 to enhance worker productivity: streamline tasks, record videos with AI.
news.summary: Enhance productivity in the modern workplace with Zight's AI-powered tools, which are currently available for free for all users until March 31, 2025. By utilizing Zight's technology, users can streamline documentation, collaboration, and other tasks by simply recording a video and allowing the AI to handle the rest. This offer presents a significant opportunity for organizations to leverage advanced tools without incurring costs. The initiative was announced on December 11, 2024, in San Francisco, marking a pivotal moment in transforming work processes. Zight's AI-Powered Platform is redefining productivity standards, making work more efficient and seamless for users.

news.headline: PointClickCare strengthens interoperability with Kno2, boosting healthcare data exchange. USCDI Connector Program launched, ONC CEHRT designation.
news.summary: In Toronto, PointClickCare, a prominent healthcare technology platform facilitating care collaboration and patient insights, has revealed an enhanced collaboration with Kno2. Kno2, a recognized Qualified Health Information Network (QHIN) conducting billions of network transactions annually, is involved in this expanded partnership. This development comes after PointClickCare obtained its ONC CEHRT designation and unveiled the United States Core Data for Interoperability (USCDI) Connector Program, showcasing PointClickCare's commitment to interoperability.

news.headline: Paychex releases 2025 SMB regulatory issues to watch: taxes, retirement, paid leave, wage, AI, and privacy.
news.summary: In Rochester, New York, Paychex, Inc., a prominent provider of comprehensive human capital management software solutions, recently published its yearly compilation of key regulatory concerns for small and medium-sized enterprises to track in 2025. The issues highlighted include taxes and tax credits, retirement planning, paid leave policies, wage and hour adjustments, as well as developments in artificial intelligence and privacy. These are vital aspects businesses should monitor. The information was part of the company's efforts to inform businesses about potential regulatory changes.
